evidence_summary: PG-061 formalises the already-built Lead Detail / Lead 360 page (apps/web/src/app/leads/[id]/page.tsx) through the MATOP pipeline and delivers the two mandated, missing artifacts via a BEHAVIOUR-PRESERVING extraction (PG-059 precedent): components/leads/lead-detail.tsx (LeadDetail + status/source/temperature badges + profile/owner cards + types — mirrors accounts/AccountDetail.tsx) and components/leads/lead-timeline.tsx (LeadTimeline — the overview Recent-Activity list, mirrors contacts/ActivityTimeline.tsx), plus a shared lib/leads/lead-format.ts (ActivityType + getActivityIcon/getActivityIconBg/formatRelativeTime) so page and timeline share helpers without duplication. The 3,287-LOC page is thinned by ~415 LOC: it now imports and composes <LeadDetail> + <LeadTimeline>, preserving every data-testid. SCOPE GUARDRAIL (plan-review ERRORS #4/#6): the rich, reactions/comments/deep-link-coupled LeadActivityTab (page.tsx) was deliberately left UNCHANGED — LeadTimeline only replaces the simple overview list — so no reactions/comments behaviour was dropped. Zero backend/domain/schema change (no packages/, apps/api/, apps/ai-worker/ files touched), so /stoa-domain is trivially satisfied. a11y-expert pass: two net-new contained fixes applied (decorative material-symbols icons aria-hidden; <aside>/<ul> labelled; website new-tab warning; View Map type=button); three pre-existing page-level items filed as a follow-up issue.

definition_of_done_items.item: Actions available (convert/edit/delete/archive/log) — preserved in page.tsx, mutations unchanged
Behaviour preserved — 22 leads test files / 414 tests pass incl. page.test.tsx + convert-lead.test.tsx
New component coverage >= 80% on changed lines (100% lines / 94.73% branches aggregate)
WCAG 2.1 AA a11y-expert pass (net-new fixes applied; pre-existing items filed)

definition_of_done_items.note: render-neutral extraction; full LHCI run deferred per PG-059 precedent

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test --run leads (22 files / 414 tests); full @intelliflow/web suite via pre-ship

gate_results.note: no domain/api/schema surface changed (web-layer extraction only) — trivially satisfied

kpi_results.actual: Statements 100%, Branches 94.73%, Functions 100%, Lines 100% (20 new tests)
No backend change; api.lead.getById contract unchanged; extraction is render-neutral (zero added latency)
Render-neutral extraction (same component tree, route code-splitting unchanged, no new deps); full LHCI run on /leads/[id] (auth + seeded lead) deferred to sprint perf review per PG-059.

notes: Scope: web-layer only — behaviour-preserving extraction, no backend/domain/schema change. Strategy mirrors PG-059 (1,105 LOC extracted, byte-for-byte preserved, validated by existing regression suites + focused smoke tests). Plan-reviewer subagent (a7ea1158) returned CHANGES_REQUIRED on rev.1 and all findings were resolved in rev.2: (a) timeline scope bounded to the overview Recent-Activity list so the reactions/comments/deep-link-coupled LeadActivityTab is untouched (no behaviour dropped); (b) badges (LeadStatusBadge/SourceBadge/TemperatureBadge) re-imported for LeadOverviewTab usage; (c) formatRelativeTime + activity icon helpers moved to a shared lib/leads/lead-format.ts (formatDate stays in page; it serves Notes/Emails/Files/sidebar tabs not the timeline); (d) LeadTimelineActivity defined as a structural subset of the page Activity model (assignable, no coercion). Two now-unused page imports (EntityHoverCard, AppAvatar) removed. a11y-expert review: applied contained net-new fixes inside the two new components (decorative material-symbols spans aria-hidden; <aside aria-label='Lead profile'>; <ul aria-label='Lead activity timeline'>; website target=_blank gains an aria-label new-tab warning; View Map button type='button'); three pre-existing page-level items (tab ARIA roles, 'View All' label, non-functional View Map placeholder) filed as a follow-up gh issue per Rule 8. Lighthouse not independently measured this task (faithful reporting — no fabricated score); the extraction adds no bundle/render-path cost. Final gate is scripts/pre-ship.mjs (mirrors CI: full web suite, build, diff-coverage, codex semantic-review).
